text: This Key Event Relationship describes how the dysregulation of transcriptional expression within the PPAR signaling network results in disrupted lipid storage, specifically in liver cells.  All 3 PPAR isoforms and the genes they regulate are essential for proper lipid storage and transport; and therefore, dysregulation in the expression profiles of any or all of the PPAR isoform controlled signaling networks can disrupt the proper storage of lipids in cells (Ament et al. 2012; Dixon et al. 2021; Xiao et al. 2021).
